raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1091 proposes to reform the governance structure of the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority (VTA).",
    "The 2019 Civil Grand Jury Report concluded that VTA’s governance structure is a root cause of the agency’s poor performance.",
    "The size of the VTA Board would be reduced from 12 voting members to 9 voting members under AB 1091.",
    "Current VTA board members are primarily elected officials who may lack the time required for appropriate oversight.",
    "The 2019 Civil Grand Jury Report recommended legislation to improve the governance structure of VTA by including appointed directors with relevant transportation expertise.",
    "The appointed directors of the VTA board would serve four-year terms."
  ]
}
```
